Local SEO for UK Businesses: The Complete 2026 Guide

Author: Kay | Published: 2026-03-14

If you serve customers in a specific area, local SEO is your most powerful marketing channel. 46% of all Google searches have local intent, and 78% of local mobile searches result in an offline purchase within 24 hours.
